## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔒 Security

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test` and `make ai-test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] No secrets/keys in the code
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
